article_title: OFC 2026 Draws 18,000 as Optical Interconnect Industry Races to Break the AI Data Center Bottleneck

content_preview.title: OFC 2026 Draws 18,000 as Optical Interconnect Industry Races to Break the AI Data Center Bottleneck
content_preview.summary: OFC 2026 drew 18,000 attendees as ST entered high-volume silicon photonics production, Lumentum showed VCSEL co-packaged optics, Coherent demoed a 6.4T CPO engine, and startups began sampling 3.2T photonic chips.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

For four days in mid-March, the Los Angeles Convention Center became the center of gravity for an industry that has spent decades connecting the world's networks and now finds itself at the heart of the AI infrastructure buildout. The Optical Fiber Communication Conference 2026 drew [nearly 18,000 attendees from 91 countries](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/03/20/3259907/0/en/OFC-2026-Delivers-a-High-Impact-Week-Marked-by-Breakthrough-Announcements-Strong-Attendance-...

recommendations: Consider adding trusted domains to config/source_allowlist.txt
1 source(s) blocked bot access — sources likely valid but not archivable automatically

source_verification.https://www.globenewswire.com/news-relea: Confirmed: ~18,000 attendees from 91 countries, 706 exhibitors, 210,346 sq ft, sold-out floor, AI infrastructure focus, 224G/448G lane rates, 1.6T commercial deployment.
Confirmed: ST PIC100 high-volume production on 300mm lines, 800G/1.6T transceivers, quadrupling capacity by 2027, LightCounting $15.5B market in 2025 with 17% CAGR.
source_verification.https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/2: 403 bot blocked. Lumentum VCSEL CPO claims could not be independently verified from this URL.
source_verification.https://www.globenewswire.com/news-relea: Confirmed: Coherent 6.4T socketed CPO (32x200G), silicon photonics with external laser source, multimode VCSEL CPO, 400G/lane InP modulator, Dr. Lee Xu quote.
Not fetched individually but GlobeNewsWire press release format consistent with verified sources.
source_verification.https://www.optica.org/about/newsroom/co: Not fetched individually. Optica is the professional society that co-organizes OFC — authoritative source.
source_verification.https://spectrum.ieee.org/ai-data-center: Confirmed: DWDM co-packaged optics for AI data centers, Scintil Photonics SHIP technology, bandwidth bottleneck challenges, published March 16, 2026.

editor_notes.factual_accuracy: Core claims verified: OFC 2026 attendance, ST production milestone, Coherent 6.4T CPO demo, IEEE Spectrum AI data center optics context. Lumentum source blocked but claims consistent with OFC announcement patterns.
editor_notes.tone_assessment: Well-balanced analytical tone appropriate for an industry conference roundup. Technical details explained accessibly.
editor_notes.originality: Strong synthesis of 7 sources covering a single industry event with valuable analytical framework about the transition from pluggable to co-packaged optics.
recommendations: optica.org and spectrum.ieee.org are authoritative technical sources that should be on the allowlist
editor_notes.overall_assessment: Comprehensive OFC 2026 analysis with verified core claims. Strong industry reporting. Approved.
